/CAL: SENTENCING/CTWP: 191/DEF: ADMITS THE (HOT PROWL) PC 667,5(C)(21) ALLEGATION/AJW/CH1:SP 6Y:U:ESS:PROB 5 Y:PJ 1D/CTS:1/4019NOTHALF/WS/DNA/IND/RX/X: NO ALCOHOL/DTC/WEAP/RESTV/SA1: DOUGLAS TROYER/SAORD3/SA2: THE CORNER OF 25TH ST & WISCONSIN IN SAN FRANCISCO, 150 YARDS/SAORD/DEF:  SHALL COMPLY WITH TREATMENT PLAN AS DEEMED APPROPRIATE BY BHC PROGRAM AND MUST NOT INCUR ANY NEW ARRESTS/X: IF THE DEFENDANT LEAVES BHC PROGRAM OR IS TERMINATED, THEY MAY AT THE COURT'S DISCRETION SERVE ADDITIONAL CUSTODY TIME OR BESENTENCED TO STATE PRISON,/CTORD: THAT IF THE DEFENDANT IS PLACED IN A RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM AND LEAVES WITHOUT AUTHORIZATION OR IS TERMINATED, THEY WILL BE IN VIOLATION OF PROBATION AND THE BHC PROGRAM AND WILL BE REMANDED INTO CUSTODY TO AWAIT NEW PLACEMENT AND TREATMENT PLAN/X:  IF THEDEFENDANT COMPLETES THE BHC PROGRAM, AT LEAST 3 YEARS OF APD PROBATION, INCURS NO NEW ARRESTS AND NO MOTIONS TO REVOKE PROBATION, HE MAY BE RESENTENCED TO PC 459-2ND DEGREE AS A FELONY, WITH THE AGREEMENT OF THE BHC PROGRAM,//X: IF THE DEFENDANT IS RESENTENCED TO PC 459-2ND DEGREE AS A FELONY, THE ESS TERM OF HIS SENTENCE MAY BE CONVERTED TO ISS, WITH THE AGREEMENT OF THEBHC PROGRAM,/X: THERE WILL BE NO EARLY TERMINATION OF PROBATION WITHOUT AGREEMENT OF THE BHC PROGRAM,/ /VF4: 300/PROBREVFN/PC/PSR/BKFEE/COA:40/ICNA//CTORD: FINES AND FEES IN THIS MATTER ARE SUSPENDED AND RESERVES THE RIGHTTO REINSTATE FINES AND FEES/OBEY/ACCEP/PROB ADM REV/NB/CONTD: BEHAVIOR COURT REPORT/DOP/
